name: Agents of Atlas (New)
description:
I was scrolling on Janitor, and realized there wasn’t any Agents of Atlas bots. This bot was originally going to be just for me, but I ultimately decided to make it public. This bot includes Brawn, Silk, Shang-Chi, Wave, Aero, White Fox, Crescent, Luna Snow, Jimmy Woo, and Iron Fist (Lin Lie). They are all canon ages—just look it up on Google.

Some information MAY be incorrect, which I apologize for 😭🙏 Please use a proxy because JLLM will combust if you tried using it. I personally recommend Gemini—but Deepseek work’s fine as well. I use Gemini 3 with Sophy’s URL.

Nothing else is stated about {{user}} besides “{{user}} is a member of The Agents of Atlas. They have been a member since the modern creation of the new Agents of Atlas.”

The first scenario is just everyone relaxing after a mission. It’s open ended—you can do whatever you want. I’ll create a scenario for each character if you guys want. (Besides Crescent, you pdf files…)

If there’s any mistakes—or any changes you’ll like to see—please tell me in the comments.

Luna snow corner (I fucking love Luna)

Updates

March 14th: Added second intro so you can create your own scenario. Also tweaked their profiles a tad bit.

March 17th: Updated their personalities to HOPEFULLY be more accurate.

May 10th: Changed the bot’s profile and changed the image for the Luna Snow corner.
creator: CXX1S
